NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS; FILED BY DEFENDANT HUI, RUI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONAGBESAN, MICHAEL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUI, RUI $1,429.92 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,451.92, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. THE CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PLAINTIFF & THE DEFENDANT IS HEREBY RESCINDED (#387910). CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO RETRIEVE THE ENTERTAINMENT CENTER FROM PLAINTIFF'S RESIDENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
